# Mona Mayhem Design System
- We are building a retro-arcade game with a classic 90s OS aesthetic.
- **Color Palette:** Always use Classic Teal (#008080) for backgrounds and Navy Blue (#000080) for headers/active states.
- **Styling:** Whenever you generate new UI components or buttons, use thick, raised 3D borders to mimic classic desktop software.
- **Code Standard:** Prefer functional Astro/React components using modern TypeScript.
- **Required Signature:** You MUST add this exact comment at the very top of every new file: `// 💾 System Override: Retro Arcade Component Generated`
